titles.title: The Wandering Life of the Three-Haired Boy

data.title: San Mao Liu Lang Ji
title_synonyms: The Wandering Life of the Three-Haired Boy

data.title: San Mao Liu Lang Ji (TV)
data.synopsis:
With a big head and three hairs on top, Sanmao, a child from an ordinary family, originally had a happy childhood, but the war made him a helpless orphan. A child without parents can even bully yellow dogs and crows. In times of crisis, he was rescued by a kind-hearted old fisherman and experienced a long-lost but short-lived happiness. The good times didn't last long, the bullies stole the fruits of their labor, and the bandit soldiers brutally shot the old man to death.  What will be waiting for him... The film is adapted from the comic book of the same name by the famous cartoonist Zhang Leping.

(Source: v.qq)

titles.title: Bu Gu Niao Jiao Chi Le

data.title: Bu Gu Niao Jiao Chi Le
data.synopsis:
Spring has arrived, and the cuckoo, leading its young, flies to the mountain village as usual, calling out "Cuckoo, cuckoo!" to remind people to quickly sow their grain seeds. Its calls draw good-natured laughter from many animals and birds, who all say it's late this year; people have already sown the seeds, and the seedlings are already sprouting.

Disbelieving, the cuckoo flies to the fields and sees the ground indeed covered in lush green. With the explanation of its old friend, the scarecrow, the cuckoo understands that people have adopted scientific farming methods, allowing for earlier planting and harvesting. Feeling useless now, the cuckoo, at the scarecrow's suggestion, teaches the young to call out "Early planting, early harvest," but it always feels that this way of calling out sounds awkward.

(Source: Douban, translated)

data.title: Yi Fu Tong Jin
data.synopsis:
Once upon a time the Chuang family chopped firewood for a living. Mother Tanja spent three years day and night weaving this tapestry. One day a wind storm came and the tapestry flew away. Kam Tong, one of the children, would venture off to the dangerous Tibet mountains to try to get the tapestry back. Very few have ever survived the cave.

(Source: Wikipedia)

data.title: Pa Xiu De Huang Ying
data.synopsis:
A little warbler sings well, but she is too shy to sing before others. So her mother thinks out a way to help her to overcome shyness.

(Source: IMDb)
